seo.title: Handyman Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your handyman business. Route upset customers to private feedback first. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Handyman Services
hero.subheading: Odd jobs finish fast and clients move on. ReviewFlo helps you ask before the next honey-do list takes over.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Handyman Faces

items.heading: Small fixes feel too small to review
items.body: Customers think five stars are for big remodels.

items.heading: Scope creep arguments go public
items.body: Extra hours show up on the invoice and then on Google.

items.heading: You are already late to the next house
items.body: There is no desk moment to talk about reviews.

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Text after you pack tools
items.body: One message from the truck before you drive off.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.a: Yes, when the headache is gone and the ask is easy.

items.q: What if a repair fails later?
items.a: Private feedback lets you plan a callback before a one-star.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same routing model without a contract for national chains.
One link still works. Customers review the business name they found.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Handyman Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first review request goes out in under 5 minutes.
